title: Lead Investment Banker at Haribhakti & Co

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Haribhakti & Co
jsonLd.description:
We at Haribhakti & Co are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Haribhakti & Co:
Haribhakti & Co is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haribhakti & Co!
